name: Cleansing of the Temple
flavorText: "Make not my Father's house an house of merchandise." — John 2:16
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Rembrandt's "Christ Driving the Money-changers from the Temple" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Rembrandt, Christ Driving the Money-changers from the Temple
classics.sourceNotes: This is a strong exact-scene match for the cleansing card.
